chief_complaint: A 62-year-old male presented with chest pain that resolved prior to arrival.
history: The patient has a history of type 2 diabetes and hypertension. He presented with chest pain, which resolved before arrival at the emergency department.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are mentioned in the case report.
labs: Initial ECG was non-diagnostic, but continuous ST segment monitoring (C-STM) detected transient hyperacute T waves and mild ST elevations.
